entities.name: CROP FORECAST
entities.description: A statement of the most likely magnitude of yield or production of a crop based on known facts and weather assumptions

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The magnitude of crop production used as a target for forecasting

entities.name: PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of crop produced

entities.name: WEATHER CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental factors during the growing season assumed to be similar to previous year averages

entities.name: NON-LINEAR REGRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to develop wheat yield forecast models

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: The agricultural crop for which the yield forecast model was developed

entities.name: ALLAHABAD DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific geographic area in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study area is located

entities.name: NONLINEAR MODELS
entities.description: Statistical models incorporating weather variables and indices to identify a suitable forecasting approach

entities.name: WEATHER VARIABLES
entities.description: Environmental factors used as inputs in the nonlinear forecasting models

entities.name: WEATHER INDICES
entities.description: Derived statistical indices of weather variables used in the forecasting models

entities.name: TIME SERIES YIELD DATA
entities.description: Historical yield records from 1970 to 2010 used for model development

entities.name: WEATHER DATA
entities.description: Historical weather records from 1970-71 to 2009-10 used for model development
